description_long: This is a modern, cubic apartment building with a flat roof that features a rooftop pool and a small lounging area. The exterior is predominantly a muted pink color, accented by a row of small lights along the roofline and large, rectangular windows on the upper and lower floors. The building has two visible stories, each with distinct living spaces, including a kitchen, dining area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all furnished in a playful, colorful style. The front facade is characterized by a large window and a glass door, while the rear is mostly solid with minimal fenestration. The rooftop area is bordered by a low wall and includes a pool with a ladder and a floating mat. The overall design is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, box-shaped apartment building with a rooftop pool, large windows, and a pink exterior accented by rooftop lights. The interior is visible and colorfully furnished across two floors.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a solid pink wall with only a few small rooftop features and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: This side view displays a large window on the upper floor, a smaller window below, and a glass door with an exterior staircase.
description_view_2: The front cutaway reveals the fully furnished two-story interior, including living, dining, and bedroom spaces, as well as the rooftop pool.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features a mostly solid pink wall with a single large window on the lower floor and rooftop details.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, rectangular, and asymmetrically placed, with some grouped and others isolated, providing a modern, irregular pattern.
